report.summary: Design polish cycle 4: audited 2 remaining build-cycle pages (omnichain-defi, stablecoin-payments), created missing OG image for omnichain-defi, added focus-visible styles to ToC links, converted FAQ sections to collapsible accordion, added table accessibility attributes, fixed missing twitter card images and canonical URL on stablecoin-payments.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: omnichain-defi: Added focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-[#6366f1] to all 9 ToC anchor links for keyboard navigation
omnichain-defi: Added aria-label='Omnichain vs Multichain vs Cross-Chain Comparison' and scope='col' to comparison table headers
omnichain-defi: Converted FAQ from static h3/p pairs to collapsible <details>/<summary> accordion pattern with + indicator (6 items, consistent with other audited pages)
stablecoin-payments: Wrapped ToC in semantic <nav aria-label='Table of Contents'> element
stablecoin-payments: Added focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-[#6366f1] to all 7 ToC anchor links for keyboard navigation
stablecoin-payments: Added aria-label='Stablecoin Settlement Flow' and scope='col' to settlement flow table
stablecoin-payments: Added aria-label='Key Players in Stablecoin Payments 2026' and scope='col' to key players table
stablecoin-payments: Converted FAQ from static card grid to collapsible <details>/<summary> accordion pattern with + indicator (6 items)
stablecoin-payments: Added twitter:images reference to static OG SVG (was missing from twitter card metadata)
stablecoin-payments: Added canonical URL via alternates.canonical (was missing from metadata)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with chain network visualization (hub-and-spoke topology), gradient title, DeFi/Advanced/Cross-Chain badges, stats row (160+ chains, $5B+ TVL, 2-5s finality), key terms bar

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: learn/omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026 (OG image created + ToC focus styles + table accessibility + FAQ accordion conversion)
learn/stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026 (twitter images + canonical URL + ToC nav semantics + focus styles + table accessibility x2 + FAQ accordion conversion)

files_changed: src/app/learn/omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026/page.tsx (focus styles, table aria-label + scope, FAQ accordion)
src/app/learn/stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026/page.tsx (twitter images, canonical URL, nav semantics, focus styles, table aria-label + scope x2, FAQ accordion)
